understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of KA59 is to complete every level by positioning all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously. Each level ends successfully when every '+' goal cell in the semantic grid is occupied by a selectable piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. When a pushable block is adjacent in the movement direction and has empty space beyond it, both the piece and the block move together. Walls ('#') block movement and cannot be pushed; some boundaries may have unique interactions. The movement-blocked flag is a heuristic aid and not always reliable. The CLICK action targets a pixel coordinate to switch control to another selectable piece, allowing sequential or coordinated placement. The player must use these mechanics to occupy all goal tiles within the limited step budget per level.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of KA59 is to complete every level by positioning all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously. Each level ends successfully when every '+' goal cell in the semantic grid is occupied by a selectable piece.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction. When a pushable block is adjacent in the movement direction and has empty space beyond it, both the piece and the block move together. Walls ('#') block movement and cannot be pushed; some boundaries may have unique interactions. The movement-blocked flag is a heuristic aid and not always reliable. The CLICK action targets a pixel coordinate to switch control to another selectable piece, allowing sequential or coordinated placement. The player must use these mechanics to occupy all goal tiles within the limited step budget per level.
